onboarding_desc_1: Discover the beauty of Islamic sciences through our interactive and fun lessons designed specifically for you and your spiritual growth.
onboarding_desc_2: Enjoy a unique educational experience that combines knowledge and fun with a variety of interactive activities.
onboarding_desc_3: We are here to accompany you on your spiritual journey and help you deepen your understanding of your beautiful religion in an easy and accessible way.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
